prose:
Method provenance
Property: HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap) of molecular oxygen (O2), units eV.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF). No density fitting; exact four-center integrals.
Geometry provenance: single-point on user-supplied geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz); no geometry optimisation performed (denoted DFT//input-XYZ).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: charge 0 (neutral), multiplicity 3 (triplet, UKS treatment).
Software: chemkit frontier-orbitals skill (engine subcommand "frontier") calling PySCF 2.x.
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged (7 cycles). No warnings reported by the engine. integrity.trustworthy = true.

Result
HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV.
(HOMO = –8.8739616 eV, LUMO = –3.5859031 eV; vertical IP_Koopmans = 8.8739616 eV, EA_Koopmans = 3.5859031 eV.)

Reproducibility
Command executed (see JSON cli_invocation):
/…/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --mult 3 --charge 0 …/oxygen.xyz
The calculation streamed live output to a .out log in the same scratch directory as the result JSON (/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/). Both files are available for inspection.
